channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government to take legal action over Knoflokskraal land occupation
item.description: The South African government, led by Public Works and Infrastructure Minister Dean Macpherson, is preparing to take legal action to regain control of state-owned land at Knoflokskraal, near Grabouw, W...

item.title: South-East Former Governors Endorse Tinubu for 2027 Re-Election
item.description: Former governors from Nigeria's South-East region don show strong support for President Bola Tinubu ahead of the 2027 elections. Dem dey praise the ongoing infrastructural developments for the region ...

item.title: Former Minister Wole Oyelese Forms Grassroots Movement to Tackle Masses’ Neglect
item.description: A former Minister of Power and Steel, Elder Wole Oyelese, don bring out one new grassroots political group wey him call the “Masses Coalition for Nigeria.” Oyelese talk say this movement dey come beca...

item.title: Iran to decide World Cup participation pending Fifa venue response
item.description: Iran's government is holding off on confirming their national football team's participation in the upcoming 2026 World Cup until Fifa responds to their request to move matches from the United States t...

item.title: UK Considers Visa Policy Changes for Countries Seeking Slavery Reparations
item.description: Di United Kingdom fit soon put new visa rules wey go affect Nigeria, Jamaica and some Caribbean countries if Nigel Farage's Reform UK party win di next election. Dis matter na because some of dem don ...

item.title: Low Pressure Area near Mindanao to Enter Philippine Area by Next Week
item.description: The Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA) has warned that a low pressure area (LPA) located far east of Mindanao is expected to enter the Philippine are...

item.title: 16 dead after lorry swerves to avoid cyclists and hits matatu head-on in Nyeri
item.description: On the evening of March 28, 2026, a tragic road crash occurred along the Nyahururu-Nyeri road near Dedan Kimathi University, claiming 16 lives and leaving several others injured. A lorry carrying logs...

item.title: House Justice Committee subpoenas SEC Chairperson for corporate documents of companies linked to Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: The House of Representatives Committee on Justice has formally issued a subpoena to Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chairperson Francis Edralin Lim, requiring him to appear before the panel o...

item.title: Over 20 Pakistani Migrants Missing Following Boat Capsize in Mediterranean
item.description: A tragic incident occurred off the coast of Italy where a boat carrying around 120 migrants, including over 20 Pakistanis from Gujranwala, Gujrat, Mandi Bahauddin, Hafizabad, and Sialkot districts, ca...

item.title: India Issues Urgent Advisory Asking Nationals in Iran to Stay Indoors for 48 Hours Amid Escalating US-Iran Tensions
item.description: The Indian Embassy in Tehran has issued an urgent advisory directing all Indian nationals in Iran to remain indoors and stay where they are for the next 48 hours. This comes in view of the rising tens...

item.title: Wireless Festival 2026 Cancelled After UK Government Bans Kanye West from Entering the Country
item.description: The UK Home Office has denied entry to American rapper Kanye West, also known as Ye, who was scheduled to headline the Wireless Festival in London this July 2026. The decision came after significant p...

item.title: PM Fuel Package Distributes Rs1.2 Billion to 32,000 Transport Operators via Digital Payments
item.description: Islamabad: Under the first phase of the PM Fuel Package 2026, the Government of Pakistan has disbursed Rs1.2 billion digitally to over 32,000 beneficiaries, including operators of buses, trucks, long-...

item.title: Constitutional Procedures for Removing a U.S. President from Office
item.description: Amid growing concerns over President Donald Trump's recent threats toward Iran, bipartisan calls for his removal have intensified. Lawmakers from across the political spectrum, including Democrats Ale...

item.title: A Personal Escape from Trump’s America to a More Democratic Australia
item.description: After 15 years living in the US, the author, Simon Adams, decides to return to Australia due to the political climate under Donald Trump. He criticises the Trump administration’s approach, particularl...

item.title: Caitlyn Jenner Files Claim for $440K From Sophia Hutchins' Estate
item.description: Caitlyn Jenner has officially filed a creditor's claim against the estate of her late friend and former manager, Sophia Hutchins, asserting that she is owed $439,095.88. According to legal documents o...

item.title: Investigation launched after Vaal teenager drowns at Sharpeville swimming pool
item.description: A tragic incident at Sharpeville swimming pool in the Vaal area has led to the temporary closure of the facility after 16-year-old Tsoarelo Likana drowned during the Easter weekend. The teenager, a pu...

item.title: CCTV Footage Reveals Daylight Shoplifting Incidents in Kiambu Liquor Stores
item.description: In Ruiru, Kiambu County, alcohol retailers are increasingly using CCTV cameras due to a rise in shoplifting cases. Several incidents have shown women, and in some cases couples, stealing large bottles...

item.title: Delhi to Launch First Dedicated All-Women Police Station in North District
item.description: Delhi Police is planning to open the capital’s first all-women police station at the Sabzi Mandi police station complex in North Delhi. This pilot initiative aims to provide a dedicated facility for r...

item.title: Father of Barrie shooting victim calls for justice amidst difficult times
item.description: The father of a shooting victim in downtown Barrie is speaking out, asking for justice following the tragic event that took the life of his son. In an emotional plea, he described the immense pain and...

item.title: Nairobi Man's Journey from Construction Worker to Nutritionist Clinic CEO
item.description: Derrick Keruchi, a young man from Nairobi, has turned his life around after sharing his remarkable journey from working manual jobs to becoming the founder of his own business. While in college, Derri...
